    Index

    A B C D F G H I J L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    accumulator - Variable in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Accumulates delta time for frame switching.
    addScore(int) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Adds score with multiplier applied.
    advancedJump - Static variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
    An advanced jump pattern that chains multiple jumps and obstacles.
    Animate - Class in Main.Animation
    A sprite animation manager that handles multiple animation states such as Idle, Run, JumpUp-Down, Skill, and others.
    Animate(Image, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class Main.Animation.Animate
    Creates a sprite animation manager.
    AnimateEffect - Class in Main.Animation
    Represents a sprite sheet animation effect.
    AnimateEffect(Image, int, int, int, int, double) - Constructor for class Main.Animation.AnimateEffect
    Initializes the animation effect using a sprite sheet and frame configuration, and displays the first frame of the animation.
    AnimationType - Enum Class in Main.Animation
    Represents different animation states used in the sprite animation system.
    Asset - Class in Main
    Utility class responsible for loading and managing image resources used in the UI.
    Asset() - Constructor for class Main.Asset
     

    B

    background - Variable in class Main.UI.InGameUI.CooldownBar
    Inner dark background of the cooldown bar.
    Banner - Class in Main.UI.GameOverUI
    Represents the banner component displayed in the Game Over interface.
    Banner() - Constructor for class Main.UI.GameOverUI.Banner
    Initializes the banner component for the Game Over interface.
    BaseButton - Class in Main.Button
    Base button component used in the user interface.
    BaseButton(ImageView) - Constructor for class Main.Button.BaseButton
    Creates a button using the provided ImageView as its graphic and configures default layout and styling properties.
    BaseItem - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Abstract base class representing an item in the game.
    BaseItem(String) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.BaseItem
    Creates a new BaseItem with the specified name.
    BaseJelly - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly
    Represents a basic jelly object in the game that the player can collect.
    BaseJelly(String) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.BaseJelly
    Creates a BaseJelly with the specified name.
    BaseObstacle - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle
    Represents a basic obstacle in the game that can damage the player when interacted with.
    BaseObstacle(String) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.BaseObstacle
    Creates a BaseObstacle with the specified name.
    BaseScene - Class in Main.Scene
    Base class for all game scenes.
    BaseScene() - Constructor for class Main.Scene.BaseScene
    Creates a base scene with fixed dimensions, clipping area, and a default background.
    basicJump - Static variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
    A basic jump pattern with jellies placed around a single obstacle.
    basicSlice - Static variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
    A basic slide pattern with a low obstacle and jellies after it.
    BigHealingPotion - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a healing item that restores a large amount of health to a Cookie.
    BigHealingPotion() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.BigHealingPotion
    Creates a BigHealingPotion with a predefined healing value.
    bigJump3 - Static variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
    A large jump pattern containing several repeated obstacle jumps.
    BOBA_COOKIE - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores the BobaCookie character instance available for selection in the game.
    BobaCookie - Class in Main.Cookies
    Concrete cookie class representing Boba Cookie.
    BobaCookie() - Constructor for class Main.Cookies.BobaCookie
    Creates a Boba Cookie with predefined stats, profile image, and skill cooldown configuration.
    BUTTER - Enum constant in enum class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.CroissantType
    A butter croissant that grants score and activates a speed boost effect.
    Buttons - Class in Main.UI.GameOverUI
    Represents the button container used in the Game Over screen.
    Buttons() - Constructor for class Main.UI.GameOverUI.Buttons
    Initializes the button container for the Game Over interface.

    C

    CellingFade - Class in Main.Image
    Represents a visual fade effect at the top of the screen.
    CellingFade(double) - Constructor for class Main.Image.CellingFade
    Creates a top fade overlay region with a specified height.
    changeAnimationState(AnimationType) - Method in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Changes the current animation state and resets the current frame.
    CharacterButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used for selecting a character in the character selection screen.
    CharacterButton(ImageView, String, String, String, Image, Cookie) - Constructor for class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Initializes the character button with image view, character information, and associated cookie data.
    CharacterData - Class in Main
    Stores all playable characters (Cookies) and pets available in the game.
    CharacterData() - Constructor for class Main.CharacterData
     
    CharacterDisplay - Class in Main.UI.CookiesUI
    Displays the currently selected cookie character in the cookie selection scene.
    CharacterDisplay(CookieSelectionScene) - Constructor for class Main.UI.CookiesUI.CharacterDisplay
    Creates and arranges the selected character display.
    CharacterSelectButtons - Class in Main.UI.CookiesUI
    Displays navigation buttons used in the cookie selection scene.
    CharacterSelectButtons() - Constructor for class Main.UI.CookiesUI.CharacterSelectButtons
    Creates and arranges two navigation buttons (Back and Pets).
    CharacterShow - Class in Main.UI.GameOverUI
    Displays the character result view in the Game Over screen.
    CharacterShow - Class in Main.UI.MainMenuUI
    A UI component that displays the currently selected character and pet in the main menu.
    CharacterShow() - Constructor for class Main.UI.GameOverUI.CharacterShow
    Initializes the Game Over character display.
    CharacterShow() - Constructor for class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.CharacterShow
    Creates the character display component for the main menu UI.
    Chicken - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a Chicken item in the game.
    Chicken() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Chicken
    Creates a Chicken item with the default name "Chicken".
    Chilly - Class in Main.Pets
    Represents the Chilly pet.
    Chilly - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores another reference to a Chilly pet instance.
    Chilly() - Constructor for class Main.Pets.Chilly
    Creates a Chilly pet with its default configuration, images, movement speed, cooldown, and spawned skill item.
    CHILLY - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores the Chilly pet instance available for selection.
    ChillyBoost - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a special boost item that temporarily increases game speed and grants the player temporary invincibility.
    ChillyBoost() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ChillyBoost
    Creates a ChillyBoost item with the default name "ChillyBoost".
    Clickable - Interface in Main.Button
    Interface defining basic interactive behavior for UI components.
    combine(Object...) - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Combines multiple SpawnAction objects or lists of SpawnAction into a single list.
    consumeCroissant() - Method in class Main.Cookies.CrossiantCookie
    Consumes the croissant reward and returns its type.
    consumeRain() - Method in class Main.Cookies.TomYumCookie
    Consumes the ingredient rain trigger.
    cookie - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Animation controller used to render the cookie character.
    Cookie - Class in Main.Cookies
    Abstract base class representing a playable cookie character.
    Cookie(int, String, int, String) - Constructor for class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Initializes a cookie with basic character information.
    CookieSelectBG - Class in Main.UI.CookiesUI
    Creates the background layout for the cookie selection scene.
    CookieSelectBG() - Constructor for class Main.UI.CookiesUI.CookieSelectBG
    Creates the background layout for the cookie selection scene.
    CookieSelectionScene - Class in Main.Scene
    Scene responsible for allowing the player to select a playable cookie.
    CookieSelectionScene() - Constructor for class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Creates the cookie selection scene.
    CooldownBar - Class in Main.UI.InGameUI
    A visual cooldown bar that follows a cookie character during gameplay.
    CooldownBar(Cookie) - Constructor for class Main.UI.InGameUI.CooldownBar
    Constructs a cooldown bar that is visually attached to a specific cookie.
    cooldownTimer - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Current cooldown timer for the skill.
    createBackgroundView(String, double, double) - Static method in class Main.Asset
    Creates an ImageView for background images located in the /Image/Background/ directory.
    createCookie() - Method in class Main.Cookies.BobaCookie
    Creates and returns the animation controller for the cookie.
    createCookie() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Creates the cookie animation object and initializes the hitbox.
    createCookie() - Method in class Main.Cookies.CrossiantCookie
    Creates the cookie animation and initializes the jelly counter UI.
    createCookie() - Method in class Main.Cookies.SampleCookie
    Creates the animation controller for the cookie.
    createGridButton(Cookie, double, double) - Static method in class Main.Asset
    Creates a CharacterButton used in the character selection grid.
    createImageView(String, double, double) - Static method in class Main.Asset
    Creates an ImageView using the specified image key and sets its width and height.
    Croissant - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a Croissant item that can move with physics and provide different effects depending on its type when interacted with.
    Croissant(CroissantType, double) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Croissant
    Creates a croissant with a specified type and horizontal velocity.
    CroissantType - Enum Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents the different types of Croissant items available in the game.
    CROSSIANT_COOKIE - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores the CrossiantCookie character instance available for selection.
    CrossiantCookie - Class in Main.Cookies
    Concrete cookie class representing Croissant Cookie.
    CrossiantCookie() - Constructor for class Main.Cookies.CrossiantCookie
    Creates a Croissant Cookie with predefined stats and ability settings.
    currentFrame - Variable in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Current frame index being displayed in the animation.
    currentRow - Variable in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Current animation row in the sprite sheet.

    D

    damageTimer - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Timer used to control damage animation duration.
    DataDisplay - Class in Main.UI.CookiesUI
    Displays detailed information about the selected cookie.
    DataDisplay(String, CookieSelectionScene) - Constructor for class Main.UI.CookiesUI.DataDisplay
    Creates and arranges character data components including best record text, HP bar, favorite button, skill preview image, and description text.
    delay - Variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Delay in nanoseconds before the object is spawned.
    die() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Handles the death state of the cookie.
    DIE - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Character death animation state.
    DOUBLE_JUMP - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Double jump animation state.
    doubleJump - Static variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
    A double jump pattern with a higher obstacle and jelly trail.
    DrawAnimation() - Method in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Updates the viewport of the ImageView to display the correct frame from the sprite sheet.
    DVDShow - Class in Main.UI.GameOverUI
    A UI component that displays the score statistics on the Game Over screen.
    DVDShow() - Constructor for class Main.UI.GameOverUI.DVDShow
    Constructs the statistics display for the Game Over screen.

    F

    FavoriteButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used to represent a favorite action in the user interface.
    FavoriteButton() - Constructor for class Main.Button.FavoriteButton
    Creates a favorite button with a predefined favorite icon image.
    fill - Variable in class Main.UI.InGameUI.CooldownBar
    The fill rectangle representing the remaining cooldown time.
    FloorFade - Class in Main.Image
    Represents a visual fade effect at the bottom of the screen.
    FloorFade(double) - Constructor for class Main.Image.FloorFade
    Creates a bottom fade overlay region with the specified height.
    FONT_CHANGO - Static variable in class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Custom Chango font loaded from resources.
    FONT_MALI - Static variable in class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Custom Mali font loaded from resources.
    frame - Variable in class Main.UI.InGameUI.CooldownBar
    Outer frame of the cooldown bar.

    G

    GAME_OVER - Enum constant in enum class Main.GameLogic.GameState
    Game over screen displayed when the player loses.
    gameLayer - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Game layer where the cookie is rendered.
    GameLogic - Class in Main.GameLogic
    Core game logic manager.
    GameLogic() - Constructor for class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
     
    GameOverBg - Class in Main.UI.GameOverUI
    A background container for the Game Over screen.
    GameOverBg() - Constructor for class Main.UI.GameOverUI.GameOverBg
    Constructs the background layout for the Game Over screen.
    GameOverScene - Class in Main.Scene
    Scene displayed when the game ends.
    GameOverScene() - Constructor for class Main.Scene.GameOverScene
    Creates the game over scene and initializes all UI components, animations, and layout positioning.
    GameplayScene - Class in Main.Scene
    Main gameplay scene of the game.
    GameplayScene() - Constructor for class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Creates the gameplay scene and initializes the player, pet, UI, background, ground, spawner, input handling, and the main update loop.
    GameState - Enum Class in Main.GameLogic
    Enum representing the different states of the game.
    gameStateProperty() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the game state property.
    get_Bid() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the box image identifier.
    get_Desc() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the cookie description.
    get_Hp() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the current health points of the cookie.
    get_Id() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the cookie ID.
    get_Name() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the cookie name.
    get_Score() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the current score.
    get_Sid() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the skill image identifier.
    getActiveTime() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Magnetic
    Returns the duration of the magnetic effect.
    getAnimationState() - Method in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Returns the current animation state.
    getApp() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the main game application.
    getBackGround() - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Returns the background image associated with the pet.
    getBackGroundImage() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the background image used for this pet.
    getBackGroundImage() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the background image of the selected pet.
    getBackGroundImage(String) - Static method in class Main.Asset
    Loads background images from the /Image/Background/ directory.
    getBGid() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the background identifier of the pet.
    getButtonImage() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the button image used for this pet.
    getCookie() - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Returns the associated Cookie object.
    getCookie() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the animation controller of the cookie.
    getCookie() - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Returns the currently displayed cookie animation.
    getCookie() - Method in class Main.UI.GameOverUI.CharacterShow
    Returns the animated cookie view used in the character display.
    getCookie() - Method in class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.CharacterShow
    Returns the animated cookie view used in the main menu.
    getCooldownProgress() - Method in class Main.Cookies.BobaCookie
    Returns the cooldown progress of the skill.
    getCooldownProgress() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the cooldown progress of the cookie skill.
    getCooldownProgress() - Method in class Main.Cookies.TomYumCookie
    Returns the cooldown progress of the skill.
    getCooldownTime() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the cooldown time of the pet skill.
    getCooldownTimer() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the current cooldown timer value.
    getCurrent_Cookie() - Static method in class Main.CharacterData
    Returns the currently selected cookie character.
    getCurrent_Pet() - Static method in class Main.CharacterData
    Returns the currently selected pet.
    getCurrentGameScene() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the current gameplay scene.
    getCurrentSpawnItem() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the currently selected spawned item.
    getCurScene() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the current scene.
    getDamage() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.BaseObstacle
    Returns the damage value of this obstacle.
    getDefaultSpeed() - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Returns the default movement speed of spawned objects.
    getDeltatime() - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Returns the latest frame delta time.
    getDescription() - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Returns the character description.
    getDescription() - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Returns the description of the pet.
    getDescription() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the pet description.
    getDescription() - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Returns the description text element.
    getDescription() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the pet description text element.
    getGameroot() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the gameplay root container.
    getGameState() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the current game state.
    getGroundY() - Method in class Main.UI.InGameUI.MoveGround
    Returns the vertical layout position of the ground.
    getHealAmount() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ItemView
    Returns the healing amount if the item is a HealingPotion.
    getHealingStat() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.BigHealingPotion
    Returns the healing value of this potion.
    getHealingStat() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.HealingPotion
    Returns the healing value of this potion.
    getHitBox() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the hitbox rectangle used for collision detection.
    getHpBar() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the HP display UI.
    getId() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the pet id.
    getImage() - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Returns the character image.
    getImage(String) - Static method in class Main.Asset
    Loads an image from the /Image/ directory.
    getImg() - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Returns the main image view of the button.
    getIns1() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the first pet button.
    getIns2() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the second pet button.
    getIns3() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the third pet button.
    getIns4() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the fourth pet button.
    getInstance() - Static method in class Main.MediaPlayer
    Returns the single instance of the MediaPlayer (Singleton Pattern).
    getItem() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ItemView
    Returns the BaseItem associated with this view.
    getJelly() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Returns the logical jelly associated with this view.
    getMap() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the current map number.
    getMaxHp() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
     
    getMaxJump() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the maximum number of jumps allowed.
    getMultiplier() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the score multiplier.
    getMusicVolume() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the background music volume.
    getName() - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Returns the character name.
    getName() - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Returns the name of the pet.
    getName() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.BaseItem
    Returns the name of this item.
    getName() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.BaseJelly
    Returns the name of the jelly.
    getName() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.BaseObstacle
    Returns the name of the obstacle.
    getName() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the pet name.
    getName() - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Returns the name text element.
    getName() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the pet name text element.
    getObstacle() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.ObstacleView
    Returns the logical obstacle associated with this view.
    getOpen() - Method in class Main.Button.SettingsPopUpButton
    Returns whether the settings popup is currently open.
    getParentLayer() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the parent game layer containing the cookie.
    getPet() - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Returns the Pet object represented by this button.
    getPetImage() - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Returns the pet preview image.
    getProbability() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the probability list used for random item selection.
    getProfileImg() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
     
    getRecord() - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Returns the character best record.
    getRecord() - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Returns the record text element.
    getRow() - Method in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Returns the row index associated with the animation type.
    getScore() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the current score.
    getScore() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.BaseJelly
    Returns the score awarded by this jelly.
    getSFXVolume() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the sound effect volume.
    getShowImage() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the preview image of the selected pet.
    getSkillCooldown() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the skill cooldown duration.
    getSkillCounter() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the skill counter value.
    getSkillVideo() - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Returns the skill preview image.
    getSpawnItemList() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the list of items that this pet can spawn.
    getSpawnLayout() - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
    Returns all predefined spawn layouts used by the spawner.
    getSpeed() - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Returns the current movement speed used by spawned objects.
    getSpeed() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the movement speed of the pet.
    getSpeedStat() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.SpeedBoost
    Returns the speed multiplier of this boost.
    getStage() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the main stage.
    getSwitchState() - Method in class Main.Button.NavigationButton
    Returns the target GameState associated with this button.
    getTargetPosX() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the target X position.
    getTargetPoxY() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the target Y position.
    getTxt() - Method in class Main.Button.NavSettingButton
    Returns the button label text.
    getTxt() - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Returns the current pet description text.
    getView() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the visual representation of the pet.
    getViewImage() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns the main pet image.
    GlassDecoration - Class in Main.UI.MainMenuUI
    A decorative UI component used in the main menu to display layered glass elements on the right side of the screen.
    GlassDecoration() - Constructor for class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.GlassDecoration
    Creates the glass decoration layout for the main menu.
    GridDisplay - Class in Main.UI.CookiesUI
    A grid layout used to display character selection buttons.
    GridDisplay(CharacterButton, CharacterButton, CharacterButton, BaseButton) - Constructor for class Main.UI.CookiesUI.GridDisplay
    Creates a 2×2 grid layout for displaying character selection buttons.
    groundY - Static variable in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Current Y position of the ground used by gameplay objects.

    H

    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.BaseButton
    Plays click sound effect, sets clicked state to true, and triggers scale animation for click feedback.
    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Handles the click event and sets the selected cookie in CharacterData as the current character.
    handleClick() - Method in interface Main.Button.Clickable
    Handles the click event on the component.
    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.MapPopupButton
    Displays an overlay with selectable maps by calling showMap().
    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.MapSelectionButton
    Handles the map selection action.
    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.NavigationButton
    Overrides BaseButton handleClick(), sets the Stage to resizable, and changes the current GameState in GameLogic.
    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.NavSettingButton
    Overrides NavigationButton handleClick(), performs state switch, and closes the settings popup.
    handleClick() - Method in class Main.Button.SettingsPopUpButton
    Handles the click event and displays the settings popup.
    hasArrived() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns whether the pet has reached its target position.
    hasBounced - Variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Croissant
    Indicates whether the croissant has already bounced.
    hasCooldown - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Indicates whether the cookie skill has a cooldown.
    heal(int) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Restores health points to the cookie.
    HealingPotion - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a healing potion item that restores a small amount of health to a Cookie when used.
    HealingPotion() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.HealingPotion
    Creates a HealingPotion with a predefined healing value.
    height - Variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    The vertical spawn position.
    hitBox - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Hitbox rectangle used for collision detection.
    HpDisplayZone - Class in Main.UI.InGameUI
    A visual HP bar display for the current character during gameplay.
    HpDisplayZone() - Constructor for class Main.UI.InGameUI.HpDisplayZone
    Constructs the HP display bar.

    I

    IDLE - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Idle animation state.
    imgURL - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Image resource URL used for the cookie sprite sheet.
    IN_GAME - Enum constant in enum class Main.GameLogic.GameState
    Gameplay state where the player is actively playing.
    InGameBG - Class in Main.UI.InGameUI
    A scrolling background container used during gameplay.
    InGameBG(StackPane) - Constructor for class Main.UI.InGameUI.InGameBG
    Constructs the in-game scrolling background.
    initializesButton() - Method in class Main.Button.BaseButton
    Initializes button with DropShadow effects and adds mouse and action event handlers.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in interface Main.ObjectInGame.Interactable
    Defines the interaction behavior between the object and the player.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.BigHealingPotion
    Applies the healing effect to the specified Cookie.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Chicken
    Handles the interaction between the player and this item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ChillyBoost
    Activates the boost effect when the player interacts with this item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Croissant
    Applies the croissant's effect when the player interacts with it.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.HealingPotion
    Applies the healing effect to the specified Cookie.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Magnetic
    Activates the magnetic effect when the player interacts with this item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.SpeedBoost
    Activates the speed boost effect when the player interacts with this item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.StickyMochi
    Handles the interaction between the player and the StickyMochi item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Tomato
    Handles the interaction between the player and the tomato item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Vegetable
    Handles the interaction between the player and the vegetable item.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.BaseJelly
    Handles the interaction between the player and the jelly.
    interact(Cookie) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.BaseObstacle
    Handles the interaction between the player and the obstacle.
    Interactable - Interface in Main.ObjectInGame
    Represents an object that can interact with the player in the game.
    INTRO - Enum constant in enum class Main.GameLogic.GameState
    Intro screen of the game.
    invincible - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Indicates whether the cookie is currently invincible.
    invincibleDuration - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Total duration of the invincibility effect.
    invincibleTimer - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Timer used to track invincibility duration.
    isCroissantReady() - Method in class Main.Cookies.CrossiantCookie
    Returns whether the croissant reward is ready.
    isDead() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns whether the cookie is dead.
    isHasCooldown() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
     
    isInvincible() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns whether the cookie is currently invincible.
    isMagnetic() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns whether the cookie has magnetic ability active.
    isOnGround() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns whether the cookie is currently on the ground.
    isSkillReady() - Method in class Main.Cookies.TomYumCookie
    Returns whether the ingredient rain skill is ready.
    isSkillReady() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns whether the pet skill is ready.
    isSpeeding() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns whether the cookie is currently speeding.
    isUpdate - Variable in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Controls whether the update loop should continue processing.
    isUpdate() - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Returns whether the gameplay scene is currently updating.
    isUsingSkill() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Returns whether the pet is currently using its skill.
    item(long, int, String) - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Creates a SpawnAction that spawns an item.
    ITEM - Enum constant in enum class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction.Type
    Represents an item object.
    ItemView - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents the visual representation of an item in the game.
    ItemView(BaseItem, double, double) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ItemView
    Creates a new ItemView for the specified item with initial velocity.

    J

    jelly(long, int, int) - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Creates a SpawnAction that spawns a single jelly.
    JELLY - Enum constant in enum class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction.Type
    Represents a jelly object.
    JellyView - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly
    Represents the visual and physical behavior of a jelly in the game.
    JellyView(BaseJelly, double, double) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Creates a JellyView for the specified jelly with initial velocity.
    jellyWave(long, int, int...) - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Creates a sequence of jelly spawn actions forming a wave pattern.
    jump() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Makes the cookie jump or double jump depending on jump count.
    JUMP_DOWN - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Falling downward animation state.
    JUMP_UP - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Jumping upward animation state.

    L

    LOCKING - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Represents a locked pet that cannot be selected until it is unlocked.
    LOCKING_COOKIE - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Represents a locked cookie character that cannot be selected until it is unlocked.

    M

    Magnetic - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a magnetic item that temporarily enables a magnet effect for the player.
    Magnetic() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Magnetic
    Creates a Magnetic item with the default name "Magnetic".
    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main.MainGameScene
    Launches the JavaFX application.
    Main - package Main
     
    Main.Animation - package Main.Animation
     
    Main.Button - package Main.Button
     
    Main.Cookies - package Main.Cookies
     
    Main.GameLogic - package Main.GameLogic
     
    Main.Image - package Main.Image
     
    Main.ObjectInGame - package Main.ObjectInGame
     
    Main.ObjectInGame.Items - package Main.ObjectInGame.Items
     
    Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly - package Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly
     
    Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle - package Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle
     
    Main.Pets - package Main.Pets
     
    Main.Scene - package Main.Scene
     
    Main.UI.CookiesUI - package Main.UI.CookiesUI
     
    Main.UI.GameOverUI - package Main.UI.GameOverUI
     
    Main.UI.InGameUI - package Main.UI.InGameUI
     
    Main.UI.MainMenuUI - package Main.UI.MainMenuUI
     
    Main.UI.PetsUI - package Main.UI.PetsUI
     
    MainGameScene - Class in Main
    Main entry point of the JavaFX game application.
    MainGameScene() - Constructor for class Main.MainGameScene
     
    MainMenuBG - Class in Main.UI.MainMenuUI
    Background layout for the Main Menu screen.
    MainMenuBG() - Constructor for class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.MainMenuBG
    Creates and initializes the main menu background layout.
    MainMenuButtons - Class in Main.UI.MainMenuUI
    UI container that holds the main navigation buttons for the Main Menu.
    MainMenuButtons() - Constructor for class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.MainMenuButtons
    Creates and initializes the main menu button layout.
    MainMenuProfile - Class in Main.UI.MainMenuUI
    UI component that displays the player's profile section in the Main Menu.
    MainMenuProfile(String, String, StackPane) - Constructor for class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.MainMenuProfile
    Creates and initializes the profile section of the main menu.
    MainMenuScene - Class in Main.Scene
    Represents the main menu scene of the game.
    MainMenuScene() - Constructor for class Main.Scene.MainMenuScene
    Creates the main menu scene and initializes all UI components such as profile display, settings zone, character preview, menu buttons, and background decorations.
    MapPopupButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used to open the map selection popup.
    MapPopupButton(ImageView, StackPane) - Constructor for class Main.Button.MapPopupButton
    Initializes the popup button with an image and root container reference, and prepares map selection buttons with deleteThis().
    MapSelectionButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used for selecting a map from the map selection popup.
    MapSelectionButton(ImageView, MapPopupButton, int) - Constructor for class Main.Button.MapSelectionButton
    Initializes the map selection button with an image, reference to the popup button, and the assigned map number.
    MediaPlayer - Class in Main
    Manages background music (BGM) and sound effects (SFX) for the game.
    MediaPlayer() - Constructor for class Main.MediaPlayer
    Initializes the MediaPlayer.
    Moji - Class in Main.Pets
    Represents the Moji pet.
    Moji() - Constructor for class Main.Pets.Moji
    Creates a Moji pet with its default configuration including images, cooldown settings, movement speed, and the item produced by its skill.
    MOJI - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores the Moji pet instance available for selection.
    MoveGround - Class in Main.UI.InGameUI
    A UI component that creates a continuously scrolling ground effect in the game.
    MoveGround(Pane) - Constructor for class Main.UI.InGameUI.MoveGround
    Constructs the moving ground system and attaches it to the provided game layer.

    N

    name - Variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    The name identifier used to determine the specific object.
    NavigationButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used for navigating between different game states.
    NavigationButton(ImageView, GameState) - Constructor for class Main.Button.NavigationButton
    Initializes the button with an image and the target GameState to switch to.
    NavSettingButton - Class in Main.Button
    Navigation button used inside the settings popup.
    NavSettingButton(GameState, String, SettingsPopUpButton) - Constructor for class Main.Button.NavSettingButton
    Initializes the navigation setting button with target GameState, display text, and reference to the SettingsPopupButton.

    O

    obstacle(long, int, int, int) - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Creates a SpawnAction that spawns an obstacle.
    OBSTACLE - Enum constant in enum class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction.Type
    Represents an obstacle object.
    ObstacleView - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle
    Represents the visual representation of an obstacle in the game.
    ObstacleView(BaseObstacle, double, double) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.ObstacleView
    Creates an ObstacleView for the specified obstacle with initial velocity.
    onHoverEnter() - Method in class Main.Button.BaseButton
    Sets hovering state to true and slightly enlarges the button.
    onHoverEnter() - Method in interface Main.Button.Clickable
    Triggered when the mouse cursor enters the component area.
    onHoverExit() - Method in class Main.Button.BaseButton
    Resets hovering state to false and restores the button to normal size.
    onHoverExit() - Method in interface Main.Button.Clickable
    Triggered when the mouse cursor leaves the component area.
    onJellyCollected() - Method in class Main.Cookies.CrossiantCookie
    Called when a jelly is collected.
    ORIGINAL - Enum constant in enum class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.CroissantType
    The standard croissant type that grants a large score bonus.
    OutlineTextImage - Class in Main.Image
    A UI component that renders text with a black outline effect.
    OutlineTextImage(String, char, int) - Constructor for class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Creates outlined text using the specified string, font type, and font size.

    P

    Pearl - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a Pearl object that moves horizontally across the screen.
    Pearl(double, double) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Pearl
    Creates a Pearl at the specified position.
    Pet - Class in Main.Pets
    Represents the base class for all pets in the game.
    Pet(int, String, String) - Constructor for class Main.Pets.Pet
    Creates a pet with the specified id, name, and description.
    PetsButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used for selecting pets in the pet selection interface.
    PetsButton(Pet, int, double) - Constructor for class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Initializes the button using pet data, sets image properties, creates outlined text, and overlays a FavoriteButton.
    PetSelectionBG - Class in Main.UI.PetsUI
    Background layout for the pet selection scene.
    PetSelectionBG() - Constructor for class Main.UI.PetsUI.PetSelectionBG
    Constructs the pet selection background.
    PetSelectionBtn - Class in Main.UI.PetsUI
    Navigation button layout for the pet selection screen.
    PetSelectionBtn(Region) - Constructor for class Main.UI.PetsUI.PetSelectionBtn
    Constructs the navigation button section for the pet selection screen.
    PetsSelectionScene - Class in Main.Scene
    Scene used for selecting pets.
    PetsSelectionScene() - Constructor for class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Creates the pet selection scene and initializes all UI components including the pet buttons, preview area, settings section, and layout containers.
    playBGM(String, boolean) - Method in class Main.MediaPlayer
    Plays background music based on the specified key.
    playSFX(String) - Method in class Main.MediaPlayer
    Plays a preloaded sound effect from the SFX cache.
    playSkill(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Plays the skill animation for a specified duration.
    pullToPlayer(Cookie, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Pulls the jelly toward the player when the magnetic effect is active.

    R

    reset() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Resets temporary effects such as magnetic or speed boost.
    resetSpeed() - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Resets the spawner speed to its default value.
    restart() - Method in class Main.Animation.AnimateEffect
    Resets the animation to the first frame and clears the accumulated time.
    resumeGameByBool() - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Resumes gameplay updates by enabling the update loop and restarting the background and ground movement.
    root - Variable in class Main.Scene.BaseScene
    The root layout of the scene.
    RUN - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Running animation state.

    S

    Salad - Class in Main.Pets
    Represents the Salad pet.
    Salad() - Constructor for class Main.Pets.Salad
    Creates a Salad pet with its default configuration, including images, cooldown settings, movement speed, spawnable items, and item spawn probabilities.
    SALAD - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores the Salad pet instance available for selection.
    SampleCookie - Class in Main.Cookies
    Sample cookie implementation used as a placeholder or template.
    SampleCookie(int, String, int, String) - Constructor for class Main.Cookies.SampleCookie
    Creates a sample cookie with basic character information.
    SamplePet - Class in Main.Pets
    Represents a simple example pet used as a template or placeholder.
    SamplePet(int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Main.Pets.SamplePet
    Creates a SamplePet with the specified id, name, description, and image key used for loading the pet image.
    scene - Variable in class Main.Scene.BaseScene
    The JavaFX scene associated with this UI container.
    scoreProperty() - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Returns the score property.
    SELECT_CHAR - Enum constant in enum class Main.GameLogic.GameState
    Character selection screen.
    SELECT_PET - Enum constant in enum class Main.GameLogic.GameState
    Pet selection screen.
    SelectingView - Class in Main.UI.PetsUI
    A UI component that displays the currently selected pet preview.
    SelectingView(StackPane, PetsSelectionScene) - Constructor for class Main.UI.PetsUI.SelectingView
    Constructs the main pet preview panel.
    setActiveTime(int) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Magnetic
    Sets the duration of the magnetic effect.
    setApp(MainGameScene) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the main game application reference.
    setBackGround(Image) - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Sets the background image associated with the pet.
    setBackGroundImage(Image) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the background image used for this pet.
    setBackGroundImage(ImageView) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the background image of the selected pet.
    setBestScore(int) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the best score.
    setButtonImage(Image) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the button image used for this pet.
    setColor(Color) - Method in class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Changes the fill color of the text while keeping the black outline unchanged.
    setCookie(Animate) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the animation controller of the cookie.
    setCookie(Animate) - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Sets the animated cookie preview.
    setCookie(Cookie) - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Sets the associated Cookie object.
    setCooldownTime(int) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the cooldown time of the pet skill.
    setCooldownTimer(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the cooldown timer value.
    setCurrent_Cookie(Cookie) - Static method in class Main.CharacterData
    Updates the currently selected cookie character.
    setCurrent_Pet(Pet) - Static method in class Main.CharacterData
    Updates the currently selected pet.
    setCurrentGameScene(GameplayScene) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the current gameplay scene.
    setCurScene(Scene) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the current scene.
    setDamage(int) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.BaseObstacle
    Sets the damage value of this obstacle.
    setDead(boolean) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the dead state of the cookie.
    setDeltatime(double) - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Sets the frame delta time.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Sets the character description.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Sets the pet description.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the pet description.
    setDescription(OutlineTextImage) - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Sets the description text element.
    setDescription(OutlineTextImage) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the pet description text element.
    setDropShadow(DropShadow) - Method in class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Applies a drop shadow effect to the stroke layer, enhancing the visibility of the text outline.
    setFalling(boolean) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Sets whether the jelly should start or stop falling.
    setFrameDuration(double) - Method in class Main.Animation.AnimateEffect
    Sets the duration each frame should be displayed.
    setFrameDuration(float) - Method in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Sets the duration each frame will be displayed.
    setGameLayer(Pane) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the game layer where the cookie is rendered.
    setGameRoot(StackPane) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the gameplay root container.
    setGameState(GameState) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the current game state.
    setHasCooldown(boolean) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
     
    setHealingStat(int) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.BigHealingPotion
    Sets the healing value of this potion.
    setHealingStat(int) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.HealingPotion
    Sets the healing value of this potion.
    setHeight(double) - Method in class Main.Button.FavoriteButton
    Adjusts the height of the button's image graphic.
    setHitbox() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Updates the hitbox ratio depending on the current animation state.
    setHp(int) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the health points of the cookie.
    setHpBar(HpDisplayZone) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the HP display UI.
    setImage(Image) - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Sets the character image.
    setImg(ImageView) - Method in class Main.Button.MapPopupButton
    Updates the graphic image of the button.
    setImg(ImageView) - Method in class Main.Button.PetsButton
    Sets the main image view of the button.
    setImgURL(String) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the sprite image URL for the cookie.
    setIns1(PetsButton) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the first pet button.
    setIns2(PetsButton) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the second pet button.
    setIns3(PetsButton) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the third pet button.
    setIns4(PetsButton) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the fourth pet button.
    setInset(Insets) - Method in class Main.Button.NavSettingButton
    Sets margin for the outlined text inside the StackPane.
    setInvincible(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the cookie to an invincible state for a duration.
    setLoop(boolean) - Method in class Main.Animation.AnimateEffect
    Sets whether the animation should loop continuously.
    setMagnetic(boolean) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Enables or disables the magnetic effect.
    setMap(int) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the current map.
    setMultiplier(double) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the score multiplier.
    setMusicVolume(int) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the background music volume.
    setName(String) - Method in class Main.Button.CharacterButton
    Sets the character name.

    Sets the pet name.

    Updates the name of this item.

    Sets the name of the jelly.

    Sets the record text element.

    Sets the current score of the cookie.

    Sets the score value.
    setScore(int) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.BaseJelly
    Sets the score awarded by this jelly.
    setSFXVolume(int) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the sound effect volume.
    setShowImage(ImageView) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the preview image of the selected pet.
    setSkillCooldown(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the skill cooldown duration.
    setSkillCounter(int) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Sets the skill counter value.
    setSkillReady(boolean) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets whether the pet skill is ready to be used.
    setSkillVideo(ImageView) - Method in class Main.Scene.CookieSelectionScene
    Sets the skill preview image.
    setSpawnItemList(ArrayList) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the list of items that this pet can spawn.
    setSpeed(double) - Static method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Sets the global movement speed used by spawned objects.
    setSpeed(double) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the movement speed of the pet.
    setSpeed(double, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Croissant
    Sets the velocity of the croissant.
    setSpeed(double, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ItemView
    Sets the velocity of this item view.
    setSpeed(double, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Sets both horizontal and vertical velocity of the jelly.
    setSpeed(double, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.ObstacleView
    Sets the velocity of the obstacle.
    setSpeeding(boolean) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Enables or disables the speed boost effect.
    setSpeedStat(int) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.SpeedBoost
    Sets the speed multiplier for this boost.
    setSpeedX(double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Sets the horizontal velocity of the jelly.
    setStage(Stage) - Static method in class Main.GameLogic.GameLogic
    Sets the main application stage.
    setTargetPos(double, double) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the target position for pet movement.
    setText(String) - Method in class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Updates the text content for both the stroke and fill layers.
    setTextAlignment(TextAlignment) - Method in class Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
    Sets the text alignment for both the stroke and fill layers.
    SettingsPopUpButton - Class in Main.Button
    Button used to open the settings popup.
    SettingsPopUpButton(ImageView, Pane) - Constructor for class Main.Button.SettingsPopUpButton
    Initializes the settings popup button with image and root container.
    SettingZone - Class in Main.UI.CookiesUI
    Represents the top settings area in the cookie selection UI.
    SettingZone - Class in Main.UI.InGameUI
    A UI container that represents the settings area in the in-game interface.
    SettingZone - Class in Main.UI.MainMenuUI
    UI component representing the settings area in the main menu.
    SettingZone - Class in Main.UI.PetsUI
    A UI component that represents the settings area in the pet selection screen.
    SettingZone(StackPane, Region) - Constructor for class Main.UI.CookiesUI.SettingZone
    Creates the top-right setting area containing the player name, Wi-Fi icon, and a settings button.
    SettingZone(StackPane, Region) - Constructor for class Main.UI.InGameUI.SettingZone
    Constructs the settings area containing a Wi-Fi indicator and a settings button.
    SettingZone(StackPane, Region) - Constructor for class Main.UI.MainMenuUI.SettingZone
    Creates and initializes the settings zone in the main menu.
    SettingZone(StackPane, Region) - Constructor for class Main.UI.PetsUI.SettingZone
    Constructs the settings zone for the pet selection UI.
    setTxt(String) - Method in class Main.Scene.PetsSelectionScene
    Sets the pet description text.
    setUpdate(boolean) - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Sets whether the gameplay scene should continue updating.
    setUseRandomSpin(boolean) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets whether item selection should use random probability.
    setUsingSkill(boolean) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets whether the pet is currently using its skill.
    setView(ImageView) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the visual representation of the pet.
    setViewImage(Image) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Sets the main pet image.
    ShowScore - Class in Main.UI.InGameUI
    Displays the player's score in the in-game interface.
    ShowScore() - Constructor for class Main.UI.InGameUI.ShowScore
    Constructs the score display UI.
    SKILL - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Skill animation state.
    skillCooldown - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Total cooldown duration of the skill.
    skillCounter - Variable in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Counter used for tracking Condition for Skill usage.
    slide() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Makes the cookie perform a slide action.
    SLIDE - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Sliding animation state.
    spacer(char) - Method in class Main.Scene.BaseScene
    Creates a flexible spacer used to help arrange UI layouts.
    SpawnAction - Class in Main.ObjectInGame
    Represents an action that spawns a game object after a specified delay.
    SpawnAction(SpawnAction.Type, long, String, int) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    Creates a SpawnAction with the specified parameters.
    SpawnAction.Type - Enum Class in Main.ObjectInGame
    The type of object that will be spawned.
    Spawner - Class in Main.ObjectInGame
    Handles spawning, updating, and collision processing for obstacles, items, and jellies in the game.
    Spawner(Pane, Cookie) - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Creates a spawner for the specified game layer and player.
    SpawnerLayout - Class in Main.ObjectInGame
    Defines predefined spawn patterns used by the spawner system.
    SpawnerLayout() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnerLayout
     
    spawnIngredientRain() - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Spawns a rain of ingredient jellies from the top of the screen.
    SpeedBoost - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a speed boost item that temporarily increases the game speed and grants the player temporary invincibility.
    SpeedBoost() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.SpeedBoost
    Creates a SpeedBoost item with a predefined speed multiplier.
    start() - Method in class Main.UI.InGameUI.InGameBG
    Starts the background scrolling animation.
    start() - Method in class Main.UI.InGameUI.MoveGround
    Starts the ground scrolling animation.
    start(Stage) - Method in class Main.MainGameScene
    Initializes the main game window and prepares the application layout.
    StickyMochi - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a StickyMochi item that provides both healing and score when collected by the player.
    StickyMochi() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.StickyMochi
    Creates a StickyMochi item with the default name "StickyMochi".
    stop() - Method in class Main.UI.InGameUI.InGameBG
    Stops the background scrolling animation.
    stop() - Method in class Main.UI.InGameUI.MoveGround
    Stops the ground scrolling animation.
    stopEnvironment() - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Stops environment movement by setting the spawner speed to zero and stopping the background and ground.
    stopGame() - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Stops the gameplay timer and background animation completely.
    stopGameByBool() - Method in class Main.Scene.GameplayScene
    Stops gameplay updates by disabling the update loop and stopping the background and ground movement.
    STRAWBERRY - Enum constant in enum class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.CroissantType
    A strawberry croissant that heals the player and grants score.

    T

    TAKE_DAMAGE - Enum constant in enum class Main.Animation.AnimationType
    Taking damage animation state.
    takeDamage(int) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Applies damage to the cookie and triggers the damage animation.
    takeDamageByTime() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Applies periodic damage to the cookie.
    Tomato - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a Tomato item that restores health and gives a small score bonus when collected by the player.
    Tomato() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Tomato
    Creates a Tomato item with the default name "Tomato".
    TOMYUM_COOKIE - Static variable in class Main.CharacterData
    Stores the TomYumCookie character instance available for selection.
    TomYumCookie - Class in Main.Cookies
    Cookie class representing TomYum Cookie.
    TomYumCookie() - Constructor for class Main.Cookies.TomYumCookie
    Initializes TomYum Cookie with predefined stats and skill settings.
    type - Variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.SpawnAction
    The type of object to spawn.

    U

    update(double) - Method in class Main.Animation.Animate
    Updates animation timing and moves to the next frame based on accumulated delta time.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.Animation.AnimateEffect
    Updates the animation by advancing frames based on the elapsed time and frame duration.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.BobaCookie
    Updates the cookie state every frame.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Updates cookie movement, animation states, and timers.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.ItemView
    Updates the position of the item view based on its velocity.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Pearl
    Updates the pearl's position based on the elapsed time.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.JellyView
    Updates the jelly's movement and physics.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Obstacle.ObstacleView
    Updates the position of the obstacle based on its velocity.
    update(double) - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Updates the pet position by moving it toward its target position.
    update(long, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Spawner
    Updates the spawning system for the current frame.
    updateBGMVolume() - Method in class Main.MediaPlayer
    Updates the volume of the currently playing background music based on the latest value from GameLogic.
    updateHpBar(double) - Method in class Main.UI.InGameUI.HpDisplayZone
    Updates the HP bar based on the current character's HP value.
    updateIndex() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Updates the current item index used when the pet spawns an item.
    updatePhysics(double, ItemView, double) - Method in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Croissant
    Updates the croissant's physics including gravity, movement, and ground collision handling.
    updateSFXVolume() - Method in class Main.MediaPlayer
    Updates the volume of all cached sound effects according to the current SFX volume setting.
    updateSkill(double) - Method in class Main.Cookies.TomYumCookie
    Updates the skill cooldown timer.
    upFromSlide() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Returns the cookie from slide state to running state.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Cookies.BobaCookie
    Activates the Boba Cookie skill.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Cookies.Cookie
    Activates the cookie skill.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Cookies.CrossiantCookie
    Croissant Cookie does not use a direct skill activation.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Cookies.SampleCookie
    Activates the cookie skill.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Cookies.TomYumCookie
    Activates the ingredient rain skill.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Pets.Chilly
    Activates the pet's skill if it is available.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Pets.Moji
    Activates the pet's skill if it is available.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Pets.Pet
    Activates the pet skill.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Pets.Salad
    Activates the pet's skill if it is available.
    useSkill() - Method in class Main.Pets.SamplePet
    Activates the pet's skill.

    Vegetable - Class in Main.ObjectInGame.Items
    Represents a Vegetable item that grants score when collected by the player.
    Vegetable() - Constructor for class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Vegetable
    Creates a Vegetable item with the default name "Vegetable".
    vy - Variable in class Main.ObjectInGame.Items.Croissant
    Vertical velocity of the croissant.
